mapper.select: SELECT rd.strategy_id, rd.biz_date, rd.estimated_revenue_cny, rd.actual_revenue_cny, rd.peak_saving_cny, rd.response_reward_cny, rd.penalty_cny, sg.name AS strategy_name, sg.type, sg.status, sg.station_id, st.name AS station_name, sg.company_id, co.name AS company_name, co.region FROM sg_revenue_daily rd JOIN sg_strategy sg ON sg.id = rd.strategy_id JOIN sa_station st ON st.id = sg.station_id JOIN sa_company co ON co.id = sg.company_id ORDER BY rd.biz_date DESC, sg.updated_at DESC

SELECT rd.strategy_id, rd.biz_date, rd.estimated_revenue_cny, rd.actual_revenue_cny, rd.peak_saving_cny, rd.response_reward_cny, rd.penalty_cny, sg.name AS strategy_name, sg.type, sg.status, sg.station_id, st.name AS station_name, sg.company_id, co.name AS company_name, co.region FROM sg_revenue_daily rd JOIN sg_strategy sg ON sg.id = rd.strategy_id JOIN sa_station st ON st.id = sg.station_id JOIN sa_company co ON co.id = sg.company_id WHERE rd.biz_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY rd.biz_date DESC, sg.updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sg_revenue_daily (strategy_id, biz_date, estimated_revenue_cny, actual_revenue_cny, peak_saving_cny, response_reward_cny, penalty_cny) VALUES (#{row.strategyId}, #{row.bizDate}, #{row.estimatedRevenueCny}, #{row.actualRevenueCny}, #{row.peakSavingCny}, #{row.responseRewardCny}, #{row.penaltyCny})
